summary: Phase 2 Monolith Deconstruction VERIFIED: All 39 backend tests passed. Calibration routes (~1166 lines) extracted to routes/calibration.py, email routes (~1816 lines) extracted to routes/email.py, server.py reduced from 9648 to 6788 lines. Prompts wired to Supabase system_prompts table via prompt_registry.py. Admin prompt invalidation endpoint working. All extracted routes return 403 without auth (confirming they exist and enforce auth). Frontend landing and login pages load correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Prompt registry correctly fetches from Supabase system_prompts table with in-memory caching (prompt_registry.py lines 25-58)
Admin prompt invalidation endpoint in routes/admin.py (lines 114-140) correctly calls invalidate_cache()
Calibration routes (routes/calibration.py) correctly import and use get_prompt() for watchtower_brain_v1
All extracted routes use Depends(get_current_user) for auth enforcement
server.py reduced from ~9648 to 6788 lines confirming extraction
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 2 Monolith Deconstruction complete. Extracted routes verified: calibration.py (1166 lines - status/init/answer/brain/activation/defer/reset/lifecycle/console/enrichment/regeneration), email.py (1816 lines - outlook/gmail OAuth/sync/disconnect/calendar/intelligence/priority), admin.py (prompt management + invalidation). server.py now 6788 lines. Prompt registry uses Supabase system_prompts table with in-memory cache. All routes return 403/401 without auth.
